name: Homeskillet Academy
description: Interactive CGG tutorial — Claude teaches governance primitives through narrative simulations, live demos, and conversational understanding checks. Covers both subject-matter governance and collaboration governance.

chapters.title: The Taylor Family Calendar
chapters.subtitle: Append-Only Truth
chapters.cgg_concept: JSONL append-only store, latest-entry-per-ID-wins, duplicate vs recurrence
chapters.goat_state: One BLEAT in seed data. Unexplained.

chapters.title: The Adjunct's Semester Project
chapters.subtitle: Collaboration Governance
chapters.cgg_concept: Collaboration patterns as governance material, meta-learning, promotable coordination rules
chapters.goat_state: BLEAT recurs. Same hash, new timestamp.

chapters.title: Zookeeper Radio
chapters.subtitle: Signals, Bands & Acoustic Routing
chapters.cgg_concept: Band hierarchy, muffling, volume accrual, hearing thresholds
chapters.goat_state: REVEAL — Mabel on the PA. PRIMITIVE band.

chapters.title: Bridge Inspector
chapters.subtitle: Human-Gated Review
chapters.cgg_concept: Human-gated review, feedback loops, warrant escalation, technical and collaboration feedback

chapters.title: Graduation
chapters.subtitle: Full Rotation Capstone
chapters.cgg_concept: Integration, conformation, certificate — both technical and collaboration governance
